Join Waitlist

Oxford Cloth Button-Down · Autumn 2026

The Oxford Shirt, Refined.

A classic Oxford cloth button-down with a natural collar roll, substantial fabric, and proportions designed for the Indian frame.

Join Waitlist

What makes it different.

Every detail exists for a reason.

THE COLLAR

A soft, natural roll -- not forced flat, not pinned stiff. The way a button-down collar should sit.

THE FABRIC

100% cotton Oxford cloth. Textured, breathable, and built to soften with every wash.

THE FIT

Proportioned for the Indian frame. Clean through the shoulder, comfortable through the chest.

THE CONSTRUCTION

Small details, chosen for how the shirt wears over time.

  • Double-layer yoke

    For structure across the shoulders.

  • Box pleat

    For ease of movement.

  • Locker loop

    A classic Ivy detail.

  • Flat-felled seams

    Clean inside and out.

  • Two-button adjustable cuffs

    For a considered fit.

  • Horn-style buttons

    Subtle, durable, and restrained.

Why We Started Here

The Oxford cloth button-down is one of those rare garments that has never needed reinventing. We didn't try to. We just wanted to make one the way it should be — substantial cloth, a natural collar roll, and proportions that actually work for how we are built.

That's where VEYLMONT begins.

Reserve your place.

The inaugural VEYLMONT shirt launches Autumn 2026. Join the waitlist for first access and updates.

No spam. One shirt. Autumn 2026.
